picker.intro: Choose how you'd like to place your order.

package.title: Package Order
package.description: Combine multiple print items (books, cards, posters…) into one order.

single.title: Individual Order
single.description: Order a single print item with full customization options.

library.title: Use a file from your library
library.helpPackage: Select a saved file to use as the print file for your first item.
library.helpSingle: Select a saved file to use as your print file, or upload a new one below.

addItems.title: Add Items to Your Package
addItems.help: Click a product type to add it to your order.
addItems.empty: No items added yet. Click a type above to add it.

singleType.title: What would you like to print?
singleType.help: Pick a product type to configure your order.

summary.title: Order Summary
summary.priceNote: A price quote will be sent to you after submission.

success.title: Order Submitted!
success.subtext: We've received your order and will send you a quote shortly.

errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit order. Please try again.
